violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machines were observed with an accumulation of black residue. Ice machines were taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. -Service was contacted. Establishment will sanitize in the 3 bay sink until dishwasher has been serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener and slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
